All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
QTouchClient
QTouchClient handles the GUI and client-side networking for the QTouch game application.
QTouchController
Controller class for the QTouch game.
QTouchDBConfig
Handles all SQLite database operations for QTouch: creating tables, user login/signup, and saving/loading game data.
QTouchException
Custom exception class for QTouch game errors.
QTouchGameModel
Simple model class that stores the current QTouch game configuration.
QTouchLogin
Login window for the QTouch system.
QTouchModel
Model class â€“ holds all constants, variables, and game states.
QTouchMVC
Entry point for QTouch MVC.
QTouchProtocol
Defines all protocol constants used for communication between QTouch Client and Server.
QTouchServer
QTouch game server handling connections, DB operations, and client threads.
QTouchSplash
Splash screen for QTouch game (3 seconds).
QTouchUser
Represents a QTouch user with id, username, and password.
QTouchView
View â€“ handles the full GUI layout and menus.
